summary: 16 active or upcoming tender and outreach opportunities tracked. March 26 update: procurement.novascotia.ca and MERX continue to block automated access — manual check recommended. ⚠️ URGENT: Hockey NS RFP closes in 2 DAYS (March 28). No new formal apparel tenders found on CanadaBuys NS results today (confirmed checked). Existing pipeline remains strong. Added Swim NS Provincial Championships as a new outreach opportunity.

tenders.title: Tournament Branded Merchandise — Hockey Nova Scotia Provincials
tenders.deadlineNote: 🔥🔥🔥 RFP closes March 28 — 2 DAYS — CALL TODAY
tenders.description: Hockey NS runs provincial championships from atom to midget. Sourcing branded apparel for players, officials, and spectators. Typically a direct supplier relationship.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo already works in hockey space (Mooseheads, Eagles, Wildcats). This is a natural extension.
tenders.notes: ⚠️ 2 DAYS LEFT. Brad needs to call Hockey NS TODAY — not email. Apollo's CHL credibility (Mooseheads, Eagles, Wildcats) is the pitch. Phone: check hockeyns.ca contact page.

tenders.title: Institutional Spirit Wear & Branded Merchandise — NSCC
tenders.description: Multi-campus spirit wear contract covering hoodies, tees, hats, and branded gear for 13 campuses. Annual renewal cycle — typically tendered in spring.
tenders.fitReason: Heritage and coastal branding is on-brand for NSCC's identity. Volume across 13 campuses is significant.
tenders.notes: Justin (campus bookstores) is a warm contact via Kevin Cameron. Ben following up. This is the inside lane — use it.

tenders.title: Staff Uniforms & Branded Apparel — Nova Scotia Health Authority
tenders.description: NSHA periodically tenders for branded staff apparel including scrubs, polos, fleece jackets, and logoed outerwear for administrative and clinical staff across HRM facilities.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo has production capacity for branded staff apparel. NSHA is a major volume buyer.
tenders.notes: Previous award was to a local supplier. Apollo should register as a vendor on NS procurement portal — action item for Brad.

tenders.title: Staff Branded Workwear & Apparel — Halifax Regional Municipality
tenders.description: HRM tenders branded workwear for various departments (parks, recreation, transit). Includes polo shirts, fleece layers, branded hats, and safety-compliant outerwear.
tenders.fitReason: Safety apparel may require certifications. Branded casual/recreation apparel is a strong fit.
tenders.notes: HRM Recreation is a better fit than Transit due to safety cert requirements.

tenders.title: Official Merchandise & Apparel — Sport Nova Scotia Provincial Championships
tenders.description: Sport Nova Scotia runs provincial championship events across multiple sports. Event merch (tees, hoodies, hats) is typically sourced through direct procurement or informal RFQ.
tenders.fitReason: Sports culture is core to Apollo's brand. Event merch is a natural fit and builds profile.
tenders.notes: Recommend Brad reach out to Sport NS directly — relationship play, not a formal tender.

tenders.title: Team Nova Scotia Official Apparel — 2027 Canada Winter Games
tenders.issuer: Sport Nova Scotia / Canada Games Council
tenders.deadlineNote: Games: February 2027 in Quebec City — outfitting decision likely Q3 2026
tenders.description: Canada Winter Games 2027 are confirmed for Quebec City, February 2027. Team Nova Scotia will field athletes across dozens of disciplines and needs official delegation apparel — warm-up suits, team jackets, tees, branded gear. This is typically coordinated through Sport Nova Scotia or the provincial multi-sport organization.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo's heritage coastal branding would make Team NS look elite. The CHL and sport pedigree is a strong credibility play for a national Games pitch.
tenders.notes: NEW — confirmed Feb 2027 Quebec City. Pitch window is NOW through early summer 2026. Contact Sport NS about Team NS delegation outfitting. Multi-sport Games means big quantities — team jackets, branded tracksuits, tees across 30+ sports. This is a serious volume opportunity.

tenders.title: School Team & Athletic Apparel Supply — New Brunswick Dept. of Education
tenders.issuer: Government of New Brunswick — Dept. of Education
tenders.description: Province-wide contract for school athletic apparel including team jerseys, training gear, and spirit wear for NB public schools.
tenders.fitReason: Large volume opportunity but requires province-wide fulfillment capacity. Worth monitoring.
tenders.notes: Primarily a longer-term target once Apollo scales production. Flag for Q3 2026.

tenders.title: Athletic Apparel & Team Uniforms — Atlantic University Sport (AUS)
tenders.deadlineNote: Multi-year contract — monitor for renewal cycle
tenders.description: AUS governs university athletics across 11 Atlantic Canadian universities. Team uniform and apparel contracts are periodically tendered. Covers multiple sports.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo already works with St. FX. AUS relationship opens the door to all 11 member schools.
tenders.notes: Leverage St. FX relationship to get an intro to AUS athletics coordinator.

tenders.title: Official Event Merchandise — Nova Scotia Music Week 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: Event: Nov 12–15, 2026 in Truro — pitch now for production lead time
tenders.description: Nova Scotia Music Week is a 4-day music festival, conference, and awards ceremony returning to Truro/We'kwampekitk for its 29th year. Official event merch (staff shirts, volunteer apparel, artist hospitality packs, fan tees) is typically sourced through a local supplier.
tenders.fitReason: Nova Scotia music and cultural identity is core to Apollo's brand DNA. Being on-merch for NSMW is a credibility and visibility win.
tenders.notes: Brad should pitch Music Nova Scotia now — production lead time for Nov event means they'll be sourcing merch Q2/Q3. Ben's media network (the Advocate, Saltscapes) may have a connection.

tenders.title: Event Apparel & Merchandise — Sommo Festival PEI 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: Event: Sept 11–12, 2026 at Cavendish Beach, PEI — pitch spring 2026
tenders.description: Sommo is an annual music, food, and drink festival at the Cavendish Beach Events Centre in PEI. Growing Atlantic festival with strong coastal and Maritime identity.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo's coastal-heritage aesthetic maps perfectly to this PEI beach festival.
tenders.notes: Confirmed Sept 11–12, 2026. Outreach opportunity for collab merch or official event apparel.

tenders.title: Event Apparel & Branded Merch — Canada Sail Grand Prix Halifax 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: 🔥 CONFIRMED: June 21–26, 2026 — pitch NOW for production lead time
tenders.description: SailGP is returning to Halifax Harbour June 21–26, 2026. 12 international teams racing in F50 hydrofoil boats. Tickets already sold out. Massive coastal/maritime identity event drawing international crowd.
tenders.fitReason: Halifax harbour + coastal brand identity = textbook Apollo match.
tenders.notes: DATES CONFIRMED: June 21-26, 2026. City backing $1M in marketing. Brad needs to pitch NOW — 90 days out.

tenders.title: Official Event Apparel & Merchandise — Antigonish Highland Games 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: July 5–12, 2026 — pitch spring 2026 for lead time
tenders.description: The Antigonish Highland Games are the longest-running Highland Games outside Scotland, founded 1861. 7-day event in Antigonish, NS drawing thousands.
tenders.fitReason: Apollo's heritage coastal identity maps beautifully to this historic Scottish-Nova Scotian celebration.
tenders.notes: Vendor application required through website. Official event apparel or merchandise booth — both angles worth pitching.

tenders.title: Official Event Merch — Pictou Lobster Carnival 2026
tenders.description: Pictou Lobster Carnival is an annual celebration of the lobster fishing season in Pictou, NS — Apollo's home base.
tenders.fitReason: THIS IS APOLLO'S BACKYARD. Pictou is where Apollo is based.
tenders.notes: Apollo Originals is from Pictou NS — this is a local credibility play and community relationship builder. Reach out to Lobster Carnival committee now.

tenders.title: Official Event Apparel — Celtic Colours International Festival 2026
tenders.deadlineNote: Oct 9–17, 2026 — pitch Q2 2026 for production lead time
tenders.description: Celtic Colours is a 9-day Cape Breton Island festival celebrating Celtic music and culture across dozens of communities.
tenders.fitReason: Cape Breton cultural identity + coastal heritage = Apollo at its core.
tenders.notes: Leverage Cape Breton Eagles relationship to get intro to festival organizers.

tenders.title: Custom Branded Apparel — Newfoundland Regiment (QMJHL)
tenders.deadlineNote: New franchise — outreach opportunity during off-season
tenders.description: The Newfoundland Regiment is the brand-new QMJHL team based in St. John's, NL. New franchise building its identity, fan culture, and merch program.
tenders.fitReason: Brand-new QMJHL team building everything from scratch. Apollo has proven QMJHL credibility.
tenders.notes: Apollo's QMJHL relationships are the door opener here. Fan lifestyle apparel collab is the angle.

tenders.title: Official Event Apparel — Evergreen Festival Halifax 2026
tenders.description: Evergreen Festival is a 4-week outdoor late fall/early winter celebration of Nova Scotian culture, food, spirits, craft, art, and memorable experiences in Halifax.
tenders.fitReason: Nova Scotian culture, craft, and coastal identity are core to Apollo's DNA.
tenders.notes: Pitch for official staff/volunteer apparel or collab merch drop.

tenders.title: Team Apparel & Branded Gear — Swim Nova Scotia Provincial Championships
tenders.description: Swim Nova Scotia governs 14 competitive year-round clubs across the province including Pictou County Mariners (home turf). Provincial championships require official event apparel, team gear, and rep wear. Individual clubs also source team apparel separately.
tenders.fitReason: 14 competitive clubs = 14 potential orders. Pictou County Mariners is a direct home-territory play for Apollo.
tenders.notes: NEW — Pictou County Mariners is the obvious first call (Brad's backyard). Also strong: Cumberland Spartans (Amherst area), Truro Centurions, Halifax Trojan Aquatic Club. Team dry-fit tees, hoodies, deck jackets are the product angle.
